query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feature_flags (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  flagKey VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  label VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  scope ENUM('platform', 'organization') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'platform',
  organizationId INT,
  updatedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

INSERT IGNORE INTO feature_flags (flagKey, label, description, enabled, scope) VALUES
('anonymous_chat', 'Anonymous Chat', 'Allow users to chat without signing in (5 conversation limit)', true, 'platform'),
('voice_mode', 'Voice Mode', 'Enable voice input/output in chat', true, 'platform'),
('document_upload', 'Document Upload', 'Allow users to upload documents to knowledge base', true, 'platform'),
('study_mode', 'Study Mode', 'Enable study/education focus mode', true, 'platform'),
('market_data', 'Market Data', 'Show real-time market data (Yahoo Finance)', false, 'platform'),
('advisor_matching', 'Advisor Matching', 'Enable AI-powered advisor matching marketplace', false, 'platform'),
('image_generation', 'Image Generation', 'Enable AI image generation in chat', true, 'platform'),
('compliance_review', 'Compliance Review', 'Enable automated compliance review for financial content', true, 'platform'),
('behavioral_coach', 'Behavioral Coach', 'Enable behavioral coaching and financial wellness features', true, 'platform'),
('meeting_intelligence', 'Meeting Intelligence', 'Enable pre/post meeting brief generation', true, 'platform');
